HIST810 Museum Research Seminar (3 Credits)

A research seminar focusing on the practice and presentation of cultural and historical scholarship in museums and historical sites. Students will complete an original research project on the challenges and opportunities of public exhibition and interpretation of cultural and historical research. Prerequisite: AMST655, ANTH655, or HIST610.

Cross-listed with: AMST856, ANTH856, INST786.

Credit Only Granted for. AMST856, ANTH856, HIST810, INST728U or INST786.
